channel.title: Arena Business Advisors Blog
channel.description: Expert insights on business exit planning and M&A advisory for service business owners

item.title: How to Sell a Service Business: The Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Everything service business owners need to know about preparing for a premium exit.

item.title: Business Valuation Methods for Service Companies
item.description: EBITDA multiples, SDE methods, and what drives premium valuations.

item.title: Owner Dependency: The #1 Reason Service Businesses Sell for Less
item.description: How to measure and reduce owner dependency to increase your exit multiple.

item.title: The Exit Planning Timeline
item.description: The 24-36 month preparation window for a premium service business exit.

item.title: What Private Equity Looks for in Service Businesses
item.description: Inside the PE acquisition playbook for service companies.

item.title: Houston Business Exit Advisory
item.description: Houston service business owners have unique advantages in the M&A market.
